plan_title: Rewrite claude_admin to a web admin orchestrator

milestones.title: Server skeleton + auth + deploy
milestones.goal: Web server live on a real VPS at https://your-server. GitHub OAuth login works. /healthz green. Reproducible deploy. Quota circuit breaker scaffolding stubbed in.
raw_prs: Repo scaffold (Rust workspace, axum + sqlx + tracing), formatter / lint / test CI
HTTP server skeleton with /healthz + structured logging
GitHub OAuth flow + signed session cookie + protected routes
Deploy: Caddy + systemd + Postgres + sqlx-migrate, single command
Quota tracker stub: schema + endpoints (real values come in M6)
milestones.exit_criteria: kill server, redeploy in <5min, login still works

milestones.title: Daemon binary + WSS pairing
milestones.goal: Run `ca-daemon pair <token>` on your laptop, see '1 daemon online' in browser. Survives kill -9 / wifi drop / reconnect.
raw_prs: Daemon binary (Rust), config in ~/.config/claude-admin/
Pairing protocol: token-based, server-issued, single-use
WSS reverse-tunnel + heartbeat + exponential backoff reconnect
Daemon registry on server: online/offline/last-seen, stub UI table
milestones.exit_criteria: daemon survives chaos test (random kill + restart loop)

milestones.title: Docker e2e infra
milestones.goal: CI spins up server-and-daemon-in-containers, runs integration tests covering pairing + heartbeat + WS RPC. Every PR runs them.
raw_prs: Server Dockerfile (multi-stage, slim runtime)
Daemon Dockerfile (Linux, with tmux + claude-CLI mock for tests)
Docker compose harness + ephemeral Postgres
First e2e suite: pair → heartbeat → daemon RPC echo round-trip
CI integration: matrix on every PR, results posted as check
milestones.exit_criteria: a green PR reliably means 'deploy is safe'

milestones.title: Repo + worktree + GitHub manager
milestones.goal: Server-side primitives via daemon: list branches, create/remove worktrees, list PRs, open draft PRs. Building blocks for everything that touches git.
raw_prs: Worktree manager on daemon (git worktree add/remove + tracked state)
Branch ops API (list/create/delete) routed to daemon
PR ops via gh on daemon (create-draft, view, comment)
Server-side manager API that fans out to the right daemon
Integration tests: server creates worktree on daemon container, opens draft PR
milestones.exit_criteria: POST /worktree → branch + dir on disk; tear down cleanly

milestones.title: Sessions discovery API (list-only)
milestones.goal: Daemon discovers Claude sessions in tmux. Server stores. GET /sessions returns a list per project. No state, no content yet.
raw_prs: Tmux discovery in daemon (port heuristic from current ca-lib)
Sessions schema + REST CRUD
Daemon → server push for create/destroy events
Integration test: spawn fake tmux session in daemon container → API returns it
milestones.exit_criteria: curl returns the list of running sessions

milestones.title: Sessions content + state
milestones.goal: API exposes session state (idle/working/needs_input/done) + most recent ANSI pane snapshot. WS subscriptions push live updates. Snapshots TTL'd.
raw_prs: State inference (idle / working / needs_input / done)
Pane snapshot capture (debounced, ANSI-preserved) on daemon
Snapshot storage: append-only ring buffer + TTL
WS subscription endpoint for live session updates
e2e test: state changes propagate from daemon to subscribed WS client
milestones.exit_criteria: WS client sees state flip working→needs_input within 2s

milestones.title: Sessions dashboard UI
milestones.goal: First user-facing screen. Lists projects + sessions with state badges + pane preview. Replaces the TUI.
raw_prs: UI shell (sidebar + topbar + auth flow + project switcher)
Sessions list page with state badges + filter
Pane preview component (xterm.js, ANSI rendering)
Session detail page with full pane + event feed (events stub)
milestones.exit_criteria: you stop opening tmux to check on Claude

milestones.title: UI polish #1 — sessions/dashboard
milestones.goal: Tighten the screens we just shipped before piling more on top. Empty/loading/error states; sessions keyboard shortcuts; density toggle prototype.
raw_prs: Empty / loading / error / offline states for dashboard + sessions
Keyboard shortcuts for sessions (open, pause, jump-to-bottom, take snapshot)
Density toggle (Comfortable / Compact) wired into the shell
milestones.exit_criteria: dashboard handles a flaky network without ugly states

milestones.title: Plans API (CRUD)
milestones.goal: Plan + Milestone schema + REST. No UI; tested via curl + integration tests.
raw_prs: Plan schema (body_md, goal, motivation, validation_strategy, status)
Milestone schema + plan→milestone relationship
REST CRUD for plans + milestones
e2e test: create plan, add 3 milestones, query, update, delete
milestones.exit_criteria: 'create a plan from curl' works end-to-end

milestones.title: Plan comments API (Google-doc-style)
milestones.goal: Threaded comments anchored to plan section / milestone / text range / breakdown PR / decision. Open / resolve / reply / @mention. No UI.
raw_prs: Comment schema + anchor model (kind + anchor_id + range_start/end + range_quote)
Threaded replies (parent_id) + status (open / resolved / deleted)
REST endpoints: create / list-by-anchor / reply / resolve
@mention parsing (notifications deferred to M12 polish)
e2e test: comment on a range, reply, resolve; thread tree returned correctly
milestones.exit_criteria: resolved comments stay attached when surrounding plan text shifts

milestones.title: Plan history / versioning API
milestones.goal: Every save = new immutable version row. Diff endpoint, revert endpoint.
raw_prs: plan_versions table: full body snapshot per save
Diff endpoint: structured diff between any two versions
Revert endpoint: non-destructive (creates new version matching old)
milestones.exit_criteria: revert v3 → v1 produces v4 identical to v1

milestones.title: Plans editor UI
milestones.goal: Author plans in the browser. Plugs into M3a/b/c. Replaces Notion.
raw_prs: Editor + live preview (CodeMirror + remark)
Embedded mermaid renderer
Image upload (drag-drop + paste) → object store
Milestone list inline with drag-reorder
Comments rail: threaded comments anchored to selection / sections
History view: version timeline + diff + revert button
milestones.exit_criteria: next plan you write is in claude_admin, not Notion

milestones.title: UI polish #2 — plan editor + comments
milestones.goal: Tighten plan editor UX before it becomes the daily writing tool.
raw_prs: Empty / loading / error states for plan editor + comments rail
Keyboard shortcuts: ⌘S save, ⌘. comment on selection, ⌘↵ resolve thread
Comments rail polish: collapsed/expanded states, resolution celebration, @mention autocomplete
milestones.exit_criteria: writing a plan feels as good as Notion

milestones.title: Breakdown API + GH issue mirror
milestones.goal: Per-milestone Breakdown of PlannedPRs with parallelization. Mirrored bidirectionally to a GH issue.
raw_prs: Breakdown + PlannedPR schema (spec_md, acceptance_criteria_md, depends_on, status)
REST CRUD for breakdowns + planned_prs
GH issue mirror: write breakdown body, watch for issue updates
e2e: breakdown round-trips through a GH issue without diverging
milestones.exit_criteria: a breakdown round-trips through a GH issue

milestones.title: Breakdown UI
milestones.goal: Visual editor for a milestone's PlannedPRs: DAG of dependencies, status kanban-ish list, link out to GH issue.
raw_prs: Breakdown page shell + list of PlannedPRs
DAG / dependency editor
Status filter view
Embed in plan view as sub-tab per milestone
milestones.exit_criteria: milestone broken down in UI; GH issue auto-populated

milestones.title: Dispatch API + coder spawn
milestones.goal: Server picks daemon → daemon creates worktree (M1) → spawns coder via tmux+CLI. PlannedPR transitions planned → dispatched → coding → drafted.
raw_prs: Dispatch endpoint + daemon picker (label-based)
Prompt assembly: spec_md + plan_context + PR rules → markdown blob
Spawn cmd in daemon: tmux new-window + send prompt + start claude
GH PR detection loop: when draft PR opens, link to PlannedPR + transition state
milestones.exit_criteria: POST /dispatch results in a draft PR with no terminal use

milestones.title: Dispatch UI
milestones.goal: 'Dispatch' button on breakdown rows; live linkage in dashboard ('Coder for M3.PR2 of project X'); dispatch history per PlannedPR.
raw_prs: Dispatch button + confirm modal (which daemon? attempts so far?)
Dashboard linkage: session row shows the PlannedPR it's coding
Dispatch history view per PlannedPR (attempts, outcomes)
milestones.exit_criteria: click → coder writes & pushes a draft PR with no terminal use

milestones.title: Reviewers
milestones.goal: When a PlannedPR enters 'drafted', auto-run reviewers via claude -p subprocess. Findings stored, exposed via API. No critic / architect logic yet.
raw_prs: Job queue (Postgres-backed)
Reviewer worker + claude -p wrapper + structured-JSON output parsing
Prompt templates per kind: security / bugs / quality / custom
Findings storage + REST endpoints; quota usage tracked per call
milestones.exit_criteria: on a real PR, ≥2 of 3 reviewer kinds produce useful findings

milestones.title: PR review UI
milestones.goal: The big screen (mock 10). Reviewer findings, validation gallery placeholder, manual decision buttons. You read findings + click ✓ / iterate / drop. Critics + auto-architect come in M8 and backfill the same UI.
raw_prs: PR review page shell + tabs (overview / reviewers / validation / diff / timeline)
Reviewer findings tab (grouped, filterable, severity badges)
Manual decision UI: accept / iterate / drop; iterate sends feedback bundle composed by you
Timeline tab: full event stream
Files / diff tab (link out for huge diffs)
milestones.exit_criteria: you read findings + decide in claude_admin instead of GH

milestones.title: Critics + architect decision
milestones.goal: Critics score 1–100 across axes. Architect aggregates reviewer + critic output → drop / iterate / accept with rationale. Iterate sends feedback bundle to coder. UI from M7 gets verdict panel auto-filled.
raw_prs: Critic worker + adversarial prompt templates per kind
Architect decision logic (rules + thresholds + LLM rationale via claude -p)
Feedback bundle generator (curated markdown)
Iterate flow: coder receives bundle, re-pushes, reviewers + critics re-run
Decision audit log + replayable inputs
milestones.exit_criteria: for one real PR, the iterate loop works without your terminal intervention

milestones.title: Validation gate (runners + artifacts API)
milestones.goal: Mandatory validators per project. Playwright + e2e scripts + migration dry-runs produce Artifacts. Approval gate refuses approval until required validators have passed.
raw_prs: ValidationRun + Artifact schema + runner abstraction
Playwright runner on daemon (daemon container has chromium)
Artifact storage + signed URLs (local FS first)
E2E script runner (shell exec on daemon, capture stdout)
Approval gate enforcement at API level
milestones.exit_criteria: a UI PR cannot reach approval without ≥1 screenshot

milestones.title: Validation gallery UI
milestones.goal: PR review screen shows artifacts inline. Click-to-zoom, video playback, log viewers. Validation status panel.
raw_prs: Gallery component (thumbnails + click-to-zoom modal)
Viewer modals for video / log / trace
Validation status panel: which validators required, ran, passed/failed
milestones.exit_criteria: screenshots open in-page, zoomable

milestones.title: CI watcher + final-approval flow
milestones.goal: Watch GH check_suite events. Fix-on-red loop. Architect drafts 'ready to merge' explanation. User clicks ✓ → claude_admin merges via gh.
raw_prs: GH webhook receiver (with polling fallback)
Fix-on-red loop: parse failure logs, send to coder via feedback bundle
'Ready to merge' composer (architect drafts changes / risks / rollback)
User-approval UI in PR review screen
Merge automation: gh pr merge --squash; PlannedPR → merged
milestones.exit_criteria: first end-to-end merge with no terminal actions

milestones.title: Self-improvement + final milestone critique
milestones.goal: Per-merge retros. Per-milestone heavyweight critique reads merged code + tests + plan, verdict pass / gaps_found. Gaps become new PlannedPRs. Milestone shipped UI.
raw_prs: Self-improvement worker: post-merge retro markdown via claude -p
Retrospective view per project (apply / dismiss)
Final critique runner: post-last-merge, full milestone evaluation
Gap → PlannedPR loop: gaps create new PRs, milestone state in_flight again
Milestone shipped celebratory UI with timeline
milestones.exit_criteria: first milestone shipped end-to-end through claude_admin

milestones.title: UI polish #3 — final pass
milestones.goal: After dogfooding M0a–M11, dedicated final pass. Fixes the rough edges real use surfaced.
raw_prs: Full a11y audit + fixes (tab order, ARIA, screen reader on key flows)
Performance pass: pane snapshot streaming, large plan rendering, virtualized lists
Animation polish: state transitions, toasts, modal entry/exit
Cross-browser sanity (Safari + Firefox parity)
Notifications: in-app inbox for needs-input alerts + @mentions
milestones.exit_criteria: claude_admin feels like a shipped product, not an MVP

milestones.title: Codex + multi-laptop
milestones.goal: Add Codex as a runtime alongside Claude. Pin projects to specific daemons. Multi-laptop dispatch.
raw_prs: Codex session detection in daemon
Runtime field on Session + UI runtime badges
Daemon labels + project pinning
Multi-daemon dispatcher: pick laptop based on labels + availability
milestones.exit_criteria: Codex shows alongside Claude with no special handling
